task_completion.description: Verify the quiz is created with the correct title and type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a quiz titled 'BIO101 Final Examination' in the BIO101 course. The Quiz Type dropdown should be set to 'Graded Quiz'.

task_completion.description: Verify the quiz description contains the required phrases.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the rich text editor or the saved quiz view for the description. It must include the exact phrases 'comprehensive final' and 'closed-book'.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Shuffle Answers' and 'Show one question at a time' are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the quiz settings form, the checkboxes for 'Shuffle Answers' and 'Show one question at a time' must be ticked.

task_completion.description: Verify the time limit is 90 minutes and attempts are limited to 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Time Limit' checkbox should be ticked with '90' entered in the Minutes field. The 'Allow Multiple Attempts' checkbox should be UNCHECKED (which defaults to 1 attempt).

task_completion.description: Verify the access code is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Require an access code' checkbox must be ticked, and the text input field next to it must contain exactly 'BIO101FINAL'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Due, Available From, and Until dates are set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Assign' section at the bottom of the settings, check the date fields. 'Due' should be approximately 21 days from the current date, 'Available from' ~20 days, and 'Until' ~22 days.

task_completion.description: Verify the quiz has been published.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a green 'Published' button at the top right of the quiz details page, or a green checkmark icon next to the quiz in the Quizzes list view.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Canvas web interface to create the quiz.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Canvas LMS UI, rather than a terminal window executing API scripts or curl commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually interacted with the form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate screenshots showing the agent typing in text boxes, clicking checkboxes, and using the date picker in the Canvas quiz settings page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots should show a logical progression of filling out the form and clicking 'Save' or 'Save & Publish', without the browser developer console open to modify DOM elements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Course: BIO101. Quiz Title: 'BIO101 Final Examination'. Access Code: 'BIO101FINAL'. Time Limit: 90 minutes. Allowed Attempts: 1. Due Date: 21 days from task start. Unlock Date (Available From): 20 days from task start. Lock Date (Until): 22 days from task start. Note: All date fields have a ±48 hours tolerance.
